name: Niyantaben Patoliya
title: Cloud Architect & Software Developer
tagline: Motivated IT graduate with hands-on experience in software development and a growing focus on cloud technologies and system/network administration.
taglineDe: Motivierte IT-Absolventin mit praktischer Erfahrung in der Softwareentwicklung und wachsendem Fokus auf Cloud-Technologien sowie System- und Netzwerkadministration.
intro: Aspiring Cloud Engineer with a strong foundation in software development, cloud computing, and system administration. Passionate about AWS, Azure, Terraform, DevOps, and building secure, scalable cloud infrastructure while continuously learning and solving real-world challenges.
